used hunt: FlexiSpot E7 Plus 4-leg + SOLID Black Walnut Wood = ZERO active on eBay; all eBay FlexiSpot walnut tops are VENEER (TB-R5528-BW 'Solid Wood Texture Veneer'). Best Tier-B = E7 Plus frame-only itm 318439630220 $200+ship, but '(1/2)' one-box ambiguity (confirm complete frame).

NJ/NYC/Philly CL: zero Tier-A; only E7-class 4-leg-ish live = Englewood NJ 'E7 Pro Plus' $500 (actually 2-leg Pro Plus, corrected to Tier-C). cnj/southjersey/jerseyshore returned ZERO flexispot desks.
FB item pages login-walled; only 1 tri-state live E7 Plus (Jersey City bamboo $699 bundle, unverified). Logged-in FB session needed for hyper-local private E7 Plus listings — explicit gap.
OfferUp Newark-metro feed: ZERO FlexiSpot of any kind locally. Mercari US: ZERO FlexiSpot full desks (accessory only). Confirms used target supply absent in buyer's region.
